detailedDescription:
High-end Turing GPU for demanding 1440p and entry 4K gaming.
Features a dual-fan Founders Edition cooler with a premium build quality.
additionalSpecs:
GPU: TU104 | Architecture: Turing
CUDA Cores: 2944 | RT Cores: 46 | Tensor Cores: 368
VRAM: 8GB GDDR6 (256-bit bus)
Memory Bandwidth: 448 GB/s
Display Outputs: 3x DisplayPort 1.4, 1x HDMI 2.0, 1x USB-C (VirtualLink)
PCIe: x16 (PCIe 3.0)
Recommended PSU: 650W
API Support: DirectX 12 Ultimate, Vulkan, OpenGL 4.6
